payload.query: Trace the evolution of the social-psychological and economic models of the vote choice. Has the literature appropriately integrated the two approaches to help us understand which factors matter? How do campaigns factor into voting decisions? Outline a model of vote choice that takes into account both approaches, paying attention to the current state of the literature. How might these models assist us in understanding voter decisions in the 2020 election?
